item.title: recently-updated
item.description: 📄 Recently Updated Notes index Windshield wiper Uncreated pages Close guard overhook stiff Two grip choke on turtle Gogoplata Buggy choke Kimura & Americana Papercutter Three sisters .

item.title: Flashy Rolling Backtake
item.description: Prerequisite: Opponent is in turtle and position you are on the rear Grab Seatbelt grip Plant your forehead on either 11 or 1 o’clock.

item.title: Straight jacket from back
item.description: Straight jacket Grab wrists of opponent Fall on side Push their top leg on top of the other Grip the opposite arms (Pullable into a straight jacket) Push the upper arm towards opponents chest from the wrist Isolate the arm with your leg Grab lapel and choke Uncreated pages.

item.title: Windshield wiper choke
item.description: Naming Windshield wiper is the leg movement to change position, and not the choke.

item.title: Lockdown Sweep
item.description: Control opponents leg tightly Outer leg goes inward behind the opponents knee Inner leg locks the leg in place (Similar method as in Triangle) Inner legs Instep locks the opponents leg in a hook.

item.title: Uncreated pages
item.description: const unresolved = new Set(); for (let page of dv.pages()) { const links = page.file.outlinks; for (let link of links) { if (!dv.page(link.path)) { unresolved.add(link.path); } } } dv.table(["Uncreated Pages"], Array.from(unresolved).map(p => [dv.fileLink(p)]));.

item.title: BJJ journey
item.description: Process Overall process is loosely based on Zettelkasten methodology, which has been changed to suit my tracking of BJJ journey.

item.title: Side control
item.description: Can lead to Knee on belly, which has finishes Can be progressed to Mount You can also Gift wrap Windshield wiper choke Opponent on the receiving end is pushing toward with stiff arm.

item.title: Granby roll
item.description: When in Turtle and opponent is on side and not applying constant pressure you can roll over shoulder that is on the opponents side and regain Open guard.
